name: MeshInterference
summary: Represents an element which is part of a clash or intersection between two meshes.

properties.name: HitPoints
properties.summary: Array of hit points where the objects of IndexA and IndexB interfere.

properties.name: IndexA
properties.summary: The index of the first clashing, or interfering object.

properties.name: IndexB
properties.summary: The index of the second clashing, or interfering object.
